title: Adyen provider config
description: Configuration shape for an Adyen Checkout + Marketplace integration. All credentials encrypted at rest.

api_key.description: Adyen API key. Passed via X-API-Key header. Encrypted at rest.

merchant_account.description: Adyen merchant account identifier. 4-80 chars, alphanumeric + underscore + dash.

client_key.description: Adyen client key. Sent to the customer's client-side SDK for tokenization. Format: test_... or live_...

hmac_key.description: Adyen webhook HMAC signing key. Used to verify HmacSignature header on inbound notifications. Encrypted at rest.

environment.description: Adyen environment. live = checkout-live.adyen.com; test = checkout-test.adyen.com.

live_url_prefix.description: Adyen live URL prefix (assigned by Adyen at account setup). Required for live environment. Endpoint becomes: https://{prefix}-checkout-live.adyenpayments.com/checkout/v71/*.

marketplace_flags.description: Adyen Marketplace configuration. Only for tenants using multi-party splits.

risk_data_enabled.description: Whether to enable Adyen RiskV3 fraud detection. Recommended: true.
